login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your company email to receive a sign-in link
login.sent: Link sent! Check your inbox and click the link to sign in.
login.domainError: This email domain is not allowed.
login.genericError: Could not send the link. Retry or check the SMTP configuration.
login.waitingAuth: Waiting for the sign-in link to be clicked…
login.sessionExpired: Session expired, please sign in again.
login.footerNote: Access is restricted to authorized domains. Sessions last 24 hours.
login.ssoWaiting: Waiting for sign-in in the browser…
login.ssoError: Could not open shared sign-in. Please retry.

adesioni.title: Adhesions
adesioni.subtitle: Fill the Adhesion Form manually or from the Excel flow
adesioni.newManualHint: Enter the fields by hand: validation on, dropdowns where applicable
adesioni.noFlussoHint: Load the flow file (e.g. 191025_aaaammgg.xlsx) to start
adesioni.selectRow: Start «New adhesion» to fill by hand, or select an adherent from the flow
adesioni.search: Search by name, plate or tax code…
adesioni.maschera_desc: Review and complete the data before saving
adesioni.successBody: The files were saved to the selected folder.
adesioni.savedBody: The record was saved locally and the .docx form generated in the selected folder.
adesioni.savedBodyPdf: The record was saved locally: both the .docx form and the merged PDF (form + attachment) were generated in the selected folder.
adesioni.pdfFallbackZip: The merged PDF could not be generated ({{error}}). A ZIP with the .docx and the attachment was created in the selected folder instead, to send by hand.
adesioni.validationErrors: Fix the highlighted fields before saving.
adesioni.numberingNone: No series started. Set the initial number to start suggesting the identifier.

config.title: Settings
config.subtitle: Customize fields, mappings, prices and access
config.sectionFieldsDesc: Add, edit or delete fields. Each field maps to a flow column and a form placeholder.
config.sectionPrezziDesc: Add, edit or delete configuration codes with their package and premium. The code is the key used to match the premium to each membership.
config.prezziEmpty: No configuration codes yet. Add one to define its premium and package.
config.prezzoFormulaHint: Variables: the form fields (e.g. importo) and «premio» (the fixed value above). Operators + − × ÷ and functions min, max, round, ceil, floor, abs. Empty = fixed premium.
config.prezzoFormulaInvalid: Invalid formula: the fixed premium will be used.
config.sectionAllegatiDesc: PDFs appended to the form, in the given order. Upload once: they are copied into the app and saved with the configuration. The default DIP is already included.
config.allegatiEmpty: No attachments: no PDF will be appended to the form.
config.sectionTemplateDesc: Choose the HTML form template for this configuration. Import your bundles (exported from Pages) once: they stay in the library and you pick one per configuration. The included template is already available.
config.templateConfirmDelete: Delete this template from the library? Configurations using it will fall back to the default.
config.templateInventory: Placeholders available in the active template
config.templateNoPlaceholders: The active template contains no {{...}} placeholders.
config.templatePlaceholderMapped: Used by a field or filled automatically
config.templatePlaceholderUnmapped: No field fills it (not positioned yet)
config.templateInventoryHint: Under «Form fields», only these names are allowed as «Form placeholder». Invalid placeholders are flagged, not removed: fix them yourself.
config.docxMismatchHint: This placeholder does not exist in the active template: pick a valid one from the list or fix the template.
config.sectionPresetsDesc: Save the whole configuration under a name, activate one with a click and export/import it as a JSON file.
config.presetNone: No saved presets. Give the current configuration a name to create one.
config.presetApplied: Configuration “{{name}}” activated: forms are already up to date.
config.presetApplyDirty: There are unsaved changes: activating the preset will discard them. Continue?
config.presetImported: Preset imported. Activate it with the “Activate” button.
config.presetImportHint: “Import JSON” only adds the preset to the list: to make it the active configuration, press “Activate” on its row.
config.sectionDateDesc: Start/end dates printed on the form match the record dates (offset 0). Set 1 only to print the real effective date per the AXA “from 24:00” convention.
config.sectionFtpDesc: Connection data used to upload exported files to the servers. Upload buttons appear on the Records page after an export.
config.sectionAccessDesc: Authorized domains and magic-link sending parameters. Defaults read from .env.local.
config.confirmReset: Reset fields to the default configuration?

registro.title: Activity log
registro.subtitle: Record of every save and export

record.title: Records
record.subtitle: Local database: search, open, edit, renew and export records
record.search: Search by name, tax code, plate or identifier…
record.exportAppendHint: Append the records to export at the bottom of an existing XLS file
record.confirmRenew: Shift the coverage start/end dates of {{count}} record(s) by one year? They will return “to export”.
record.renewedBody: {{count}} record(s) renewed by one year and set back “to export”.
record.exportedBody: {{count}} records exported. The records were archived.
record.appendedBody: {{count}} records appended to the selected file and archived.
record.selectToReexport: Select at least one record to re-export.
record.selectToRenew: Select at least one record to renew.

scadenze.title: Expirations
scadenze.subtitle: Coverages expiring last month, this month and next month
scadenze.empty: No coverage expiring between last month and next month.
